scripts.deploy: cd android && ./gradlew installRelease && DEVICE=$(adb devices | grep -v emulator | grep -w device | head -1 | awk '{print $1}') && adb -s $DEVICE shell am start -n com.keplerandroidtv/.MainActivity
scripts.deploy:clean: rm -rf android/app/build && cd android && ./gradlew installRelease && DEVICE=$(adb devices | grep -v emulator | grep -w device | head -1 | awk '{print $1}') && adb -s $DEVICE shell am start -n com.keplerandroidtv/.MainActivity
